Name: Event Counter
Description: Counts the number of times an event passes through. Stores the count at an address in operation state. Passes the event through to downstream nodes.

EventInputs.Name: Trigger
EventInputs.Description: Increment the counter and pass through

SettingsInputs.Name: CounterName
SettingsInputs.Description: Label for this counter (for display and logging)

SettingsInputs.Name: OutputAddress
SettingsInputs.Description: State address to write the count to (e.g. OperationState.MyCounter)
